children.heading: Imposition of fee
children.label: a Imposition of fee
children.text: There is hereby imposed on each specified health insurance policy for each policy year ending after , a fee equal to the product of $2 ($1 in the case of policy years ending during fiscal year 2013) multiplied by the average number of lives covered under the policy.September 30, 2012

children.heading: Liability for fee
children.label: b Liability for fee
children.text: The fee imposed by subsection (a) shall be paid by the issuer of the policy.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, the term “specified health insurance policy” means any accident or health insurance policy (including a policy under a group health plan) issued with respect to individuals residing in the United States.

children.heading: Exemption for certain policies
children.label: 2 Exemption for certain policies
children.text: The term “specified health insurance policy” does not include any insurance if substantially all of its coverage is of excepted benefits described in section 9832(c).

children.heading: Treatment of prepaid health coverage arrangements
children.label: 3 Treatment of prepaid health coverage arrangements

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: In the case of any arrangement described in subparagraph (B), such arrangement shall be treated as a specified health insurance policy, and the person referred to in such subparagraph shall be treated as the issuer.

children.heading: Description of arrangements
children.label: B Description of arrangements
children.text: An arrangement is described in this subparagraph if under such arrangement fixed payments or premiums are received as consideration for any person’s agreement to provide or arrange for the provision of accident or health coverage to residents of the United States, regardless of how such coverage is provided or arranged to be provided.

children.heading: Adjustments for increases in health care spending
children.label: d Adjustments for increases in health care spending

children.text: such dollar amount for policy years ending in the previous fiscal year, multiplied by
the percentage increase in the projected per capita amount of National Health Expenditures, as most recently published by the Secretary before the beginning of the fiscal year.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: e Termination
children.text: This section shall not apply to policy years ending after .September 30, 2029
